/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hiredis.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libhiredisd.so.1.1.0 -o libhiredisd.so.1.1.0 CMakeFiles/hiredis.dir/alloc.c.o CMakeFiles/hiredis.dir/async.c.o CMakeFiles/hiredis.dir/hiredis.c.o CMakeFiles/hiredis.dir/net.c.o CMakeFiles/hiredis.dir/read.c.o CMakeFiles/hiredis.dir/sds.c.o CMakeFiles/hiredis.dir/sockcompat.c.o
